title: solenostemon gracilifolius
intro: Solenostemon gracilifolius, also known as Coleus, is a species of flowering plant in the family Lamiaceae, commonly found in tropical regions of Africa. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties that can help to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Solenostemon gracilifolius include reducing fever, relieving pain, and treating skin conditions such as eczema and acne. Herbal preparations of the plant include teas, infusions, and decoctions, which can be used to extract its medicinal properties and provide relief from various health issues.
